title: melhania erythroxylon
intro: Melhania erythroxylon, also known as Indian gentian or horse gentian, is a plant species within the family Malvaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Melhania erythroxylon include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its role in supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for use in traditional medicine.
